headline: S&P Global Market Intelligence Partners with Farsight to Launch AI-powered Financial Workflow Capability for Capital IQ Pro
summary: S&P Global Market Intelligence, a division of S&P Global (NYSE: SPGI), today announced a powerful new AI-driven capability that enables bankers and investors to accelerate the creation of client-ready materials directly within S&P Global's Capital IQ Pro platform.
